Axiom — Home Run!

HOME RUN!
Hold SPACE to load the bat. Release to swing.
A / D shift the batter · 10 pitches · clear the wall
ROUND OVER
SCORE 0
HOME RUNS 0
BEST DISTANCE —
Press SPACE or ENTER to play again
SCORE 0 PITCH 1/10 HR 0 STREAK 1× PITCH SPEED — BEST —
◀ STEP
HOLD TO LOAD · RELEASE TO SWING
STEP ▶
A/D shift the batter · hold SPACE to load, release to swing · SPACE/ENTER restarts after pitch 10
